content:
1 hour ago

--

After weeks of designing, coding, testing, and refining, the first MVP of Dream-Life is almost ready.
Dream-Life is an AI-powered productivity platform built around one simple idea:
Dreams become achievable when they become plans.
You tell Dream-Life what you want to achieve.
The AI creates a personalized roadmap, divides it into milestones, generates daily tasks, and helps you stay consistent while tracking your progress.
Instead of asking yourself "Where do I begin?", you always know your next step.
🚀 The MVP launches in just 2 days.
If you’d like to be one of the first people to try Dream-Life, the waitlist is already open.
This is just the beginning of the journey.
Turn Dreams Into Plans. 🌱
